3096760.name: Block Siege VR
3096760.description:
Dive into the heart-pounding world of Block Siege VR where imagination meets survival in an electrifying virtual reality adventure. Build your world, fend off waves of relentless robots, and dominate in diverse and unique battlegrounds!

Detailed Description:

Block Siege VR invites players into a dynamic universe where creativity reigns supreme. Craft intricate fortresses and cunning defenses using an intuitive block-
building system that transforms your ideas into reality. But beware—the challenge doesn't end there!



Construct and Conquer:

Construct your world block by block in Build Mode, then brace yourself for high-octane combat using your own world or other unique maps in Survival Mode . Engage in intense battles against waves of increasingly ferocious robots that test your strategy, reflexes, and marksmanship. Move swiftly, strategically use and place blocks for cover, and master your arsenal to survive.



Key Features:


  • - Build Your Empire: Shape your surroundings and build your defenses with a vast array of blocks.
  • - Survive and Thrive: Battle through relentless waves of robots, adapting your tactics as challenges escalate.
  • - Explore Unique Worlds: Experience adrenaline-pumping battles in iconic locales like gladiator arenas and futuristic Sci-Fi cities.
  • - Immersive VR Action: Immerse yourself in a VR experience like no other, where every move feels real and every decision matters.
  • - Manual Gunplay: Feel the tension as you manually reload your weapons amidst fast-paced battles, requiring skill and precision under pressure.
  • - Regular Updates, New Maps, and Community Contests: Be a part of the Block Siege VR Community and get regular updates to the game that includes newly included maps/arenas, new blocks, and competitions for "Best Developed World" that will be featured as playable maps in new updates.




What are you waiting for? Grab a block... and lay siege!
3096760.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
